subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! This is a handmaiden from among Thy handmaidens and a leaf from among Thy leaves who hath inhaled the fragrance of Thy Manifestation and hath testified to that which was testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذه امه من امائک و ورقه من اوراقک قد وجدت عرف ظهورک و شهدت بما شهد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for women, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
